sp_widget.name: Dynamic Tree Level Summary
sp_widget.template:

  • ${Instructions}
  • ${Subtasks by State}
  • ${Subtasks by Status}
  • ${Summary Card}
  • ${Subtasks}
  • ${Response Log}
  • ${Task Requests}
  • ${Shared Attachments}

  • ${Activity Log}
